To compute \( E(X) \) and \( \text{Var}(X) \):

1. **Expected Value (E(X))**:
   \( E(X) = \sum x_i \cdot P(X = x_i) = 0 \cdot \frac{8}{27} + 1 \cdot \frac{12}{27} + 2 \cdot \frac{6}{27} + 3 \cdot \frac{1}{27} = \frac{12 + 12 + 3}{27} = \frac{27}{27} = 1 \).
